product_name: Doodle Copy Machine – Trace, Print & Color Drawing Toy

bullets: Discover Doodle Copy, the perfect toy to learn to draw! Select cling templates, place them on the drawing surface, and trace your design. Once done, press the button and watch as your printed drawing comes out like magic! Color and decorate your drawing with crayons and stickers.
Great for boys and girls ages 4+ to have fun drawing scenes or doodle their own creations. Themed tracing templates can be mixed and combined to make unique pictures
Once you've finished tracing, press the button to print your drawing on a blank sheet of paper. Watch your drawing come to life
Use the crayons and stickers to add colors, patterns, and details. It's time to let your imagination run wild!

Contents: 1 Doodle Copy drawing machine, 6 sheets of transfer paper, 50 cling tracing templates, 10 sheets of drawing paper, 5 crayons, 1 sticker sheet, and instructions.
3 AA Batteries required, not included
content.description: This set includes 50 different template shapes to combine and cling to the drawing surface for easy tracing. Kids can explore creating different scenes, make signs, or cartoons. Combine the animals, dinos, sea life and more with a variety of icons and scenery. Add personal touches with doodles or write messages. The original artwork is copied and printed for keeping!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 Doodle Copy drawing machine, 6 sheets of transfer paper, 50 cling tracing templates, 10 sheets of drawing paper, 5 crayons, 1 sticker sheet, and instructions.
